heading: Funds available for workers compensation payments
label: 1907b Funds available for workers compensation payments
text: Available balances of expired United States Capitol Police appropriations shall be available to the Capitol Police to make the deposit to the credit of the Employees’ Compensation Fund required by .section 8147(b) of title 5
notes: Effective DateSection applicable with respect to appropriations for fiscal year 2014 and each fiscal year thereafter, see , set out as an Effective Date of 2014 Amendment note under .section 1002(c) of Pub. L. 113–76section 1907 of this title
